tests.description: ATDD API tests for Story 2-3 Cashier-Assisted Intake and Voucher Delivery Scheduling (RED PHASE)
acceptance_criteria_covered: Given staff enters intake/scheduling details, when they submit, then the same validation, capacity, and refusal rules as public intake apply.
Resulting requests link to commitments or refusal outcomes.
Given cashier staff submit or correct intake details, when validation/refusal occurs, then operator-facing feedback is immediate, actionable, and parity-aligned with donor flow.

summary: Generated 5 FAILING API tests for Story 2-3
